note: Read all relevant files to understand current implementation

Restructure PairCard to add Trade button linking to /trade?debtToken=0x...&collateralToken=0x... while keeping existing pair-page navigation. Use invisible overlay link pattern with z-index to allow both card-level and button-level click targets.

Modify handleQuickLend to navigate to /trade?debtToken=...&collateralToken=...&orderId=... instead of executing on-chain directly or navigating to /order/. Remove now-unused imports (InscriptionClient, toU256, RpcProvider, useSendTransaction, useSync, CONTRACT_ADDRESS, RPC_URL) and quickLendPending state.
